DeleteMe

2026, Feb 22    

What is Thundercipher?

It is a website that provides challenges that help learning and practicing ethical hacking and cybersecurity concepts.

Prerequisite

you need to know what are major OWASP and web vulnerabilities.

Tools/Commands you may need:

Burp Suite, curl

Solution:

Start the machine and open the web at port 5000.
There is simple website for tracking fitness goals. you can register, login and manage your profile.

I tried to check the source code and cookies too but there is nothing usefull.
I registered a new account, opened.
I opened burpsuite and tried intercepting the requests while trying to delete my account.

There it was while i tried to delete account the request passes id of the account along with it.

you can change the account id to 1 which probably belong to admin.
Change the id and forward the request. There you will get your flag as an alert box.

There is your flag.

ThunderCipher{id0r_4cc0unt_t4k30v3r_2k26.

Twitter Facebook Google+
# IDOR # OWASP
